description: Calculate tiered seller commissions in /home/ga/Documents/seller_commissions.xlsx. In the 'Payouts' sheet, populate the Total_Sales (Column B), Commission_Rate (Column C), Commission_Amount (Column D), and Marketplace_Net (Column E) for all 45 sellers. Aggregate sales data from the 'Orders' sheet and determine the appropriate commission rates based on the 'Tiers' sheet. Include a 'Grand Total' row in cell A47 with total sums for the sales, commission amount, and net columns. Save the updated spreadsheet.

metadata.data_source: Subset simulating Olist Brazilian E-commerce dataset
